issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for deployment and instrumentation.

scenarios.name: spring-boot-3-instrumentation
scenarios.rationale: The treatment delivers the exact Micrometer-bridge-brave + zipkin-reporter-brave dependency pair plus the MDC logging pattern `%X{traceId:-},%X{spanId:-}`, where the baseline gets the overall approach right but is hazy on the precise property keys under `management.tracing` and the log pattern.

scenarios.name: zipkin-elasticsearch-docker-compose
scenarios.rationale: Both produce a working compose file, but the treatment pins `openzipkin/zipkin:3` and includes ES_INDEX/REPLICAS/SHARDS and SELF_TRACING_ENABLED that the skill calls out, which the baseline omits.
